events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! Still shredding and inspiring generations.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: 83 years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to rock icon Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, changing music forever. The first video? The ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it? You tell us.

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 22 years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and Britpop was never the same. An absolute game-changer.

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, 'An Aquarian Exposition: 3 Days of Peace & Music', began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A moment in time that defined a generation.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: This day marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His voice, his moves, his legacy – forever the King.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's shooting
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, passing away six days later. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Impact
angles.copy: 30 years since the tragic shooting of Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and undeniable influence continue to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: This day marks 56 years since the death of guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. Still unmatched on the guitar.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover, on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57! That album cover is as legendary as the tracks inside.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking with that unmistakable voice and attitude.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Legendary Lad
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on this day in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A timeless message that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed how we listened to music forever. What was on your first one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over 60 years of 007. What's your favourite Bond film or theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the life and enduring legacy of John Lennon. Imagine.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles released 'White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles delivered their sprawling, experimental 'White Album'. A masterpiece of diverse sounds.
